Attendance Certificate 25 April 2026

Dicoding Developer Conference 2026

Dicoding Indonesia

Attendance certificate for participating in Dicoding Developer Conference 2026 organized by Dicoding Indonesia. This certificate reflects active involvement in a developer-focused event covering technology, learning, and industry insight.

Issuer

  • Dicoding Indonesia
  • Signed by Narenda Wicaksono, CEO Dicoding Indonesia

What This Certificate Represents

  • Participated in a major developer conference hosted by Dicoding.
  • Stayed connected with current discussions, trends, and insights in the Indonesian tech ecosystem.
  • Showed commitment to continuous learning through industry events and community-driven knowledge sharing.

Relevance

This certificate shows consistency in staying active within the developer community, not only through building products but also through attending industry events that broaden perspective and keep technical knowledge current.
